productionEpochPolicy.closeRule: An epoch closes only after all creation targets and its bounded refinement-and-pruning slice pass validation and publication.

legacyPlayableUpgrades.note: Legacy playable upgrades remain excluded from new-production creation counts.

lastCatalogUnit.result: Accepted 10 genuinely new natural-language kit contracts after six additional duplicate, catalog-overlap, or blurred-scope rejections; no implementation was created.

lastCreationUnit.result: Upgraded Next Ledge with a completion-gated summit broadcast, route handshake, reversed-wind sector opening, four authored counterwind anchors, and measured Playwright plus Human View proof; production creation counts remain unchanged.

lastRefinementUnit.scope: Next Ledge post-rest safe-versus-pressure route choice
lastRefinementUnit.result: Counterwind Rest now opens one readable mint recovery line and one amber signal shortcut at +46 pressure; both paths use the existing route/cargo/pressure owners and converge at Fork Relay.

lastCompletedUnit.scope: Next Ledge post-rest safe-versus-pressure route choice
lastCompletedUnit.result: Counterwind Rest now presents Shelter Rise as a zero-pressure recovery ascent and Signal Cut as a 1.75-cargo shortcut at +46 pressure before both paths rejoin at Fork Relay.
lastCompletedUnit.validation: All 28 Next Ledge test entrypoints and changed-file syntax passed. Playwright traversed both complete changed branches through session input, proved 0-pressure/3.5-cargo safe rejoin, 45-pressure/4.25-cargo shortcut rejoin, 100-pressure failure and zero-pressure retry, closed/open/closed Advanced disclosure, stable settled DOM/entity/descriptor counts, and zero console messages. Human View passed first-screen, choice, both rejoin, failure, and recovery screenshots; the fresh-browser matched active-play sample held 8.83 to 8.80 FPS (-0.4%) while aggregate long-task rate and duration improved.
lastCompletedUnit.publication: Experiments production commit 38b782940c62c473cb87c65b7235e916f8a9155d is published on origin/main after fetch-before-push verification; ProtoKits is unchanged and synchronized at 04d34f049f58ae359cf71d43466c429dac2a6d08.

exactNextUnit.goal: Carry the chosen route consequence through the first post-rejoin restore with one protected grapple window after Shelter Rise versus a visible retained-pressure vent demand after Signal Cut, using the existing recovery and pressure owners.
